_doc: Filter #4 R1: bare 'M1' without inline definition, deliberate mode → BLOCK with rule R1-no-invented-abbreviations.

content.text: Recommend we proceed with M1 next quarter, then revisit.

standing_rules_pack:
# Test pack
\b(M[1-9]|H[1-9]|S[1-9])\b(?!\s*[\u2014\u2013\-(:]\s*[A-Z])::R1-no-invented-abbreviations::Abbreviations (M1/H2/etc.) used without inline definition. Spell out on first use.
